summary: Implemented the Stage 7B non-live worker launch preparation bridge from planning tasks to WorkerLaunchRequest and worker-run metadata.

tests_run.command: uv run --no-sync python -B -m pytest tests/test_worker_launches.py -q -p no:cacheprovider

tests_run.summary: 276 passed plus Ruff, format, mypy, CLI smoke checks, file justification, public hygiene, planning integrity, skill inventory, source inventory, protected locks, and uv lock --check.

Worker launch preparation builds WorkerL.evidence: prepare_worker_launch_request builds WorkerLaunchRequest using Stage 7A layout paths for worktree, prompt, JSONL, stdout, stderr, final-message, diff-summary, and durable result output while carrying task contract fields.

Worker-run metadata exposes the same raw.evidence: WorkerLaunchPreparation.worker_run_metadata includes launch_preparation settings, durable_result_path, worktree_path, and raw_evidence_paths from WorktreeRunLayout.

Preparation is non-live: tests prove it.evidence: Focused tests build launch preparations against tmp_path and assert worktrees/, runs/, and artifacts/ are not created.

Focused tests cover successful preparati.evidence: tests/test_worker_launches.py covers successful request preparation, worker-run metadata exposure, and unsafe worker_run_id rejection via WorktreeArtifactError.

risks: Stage 7B is still non-live: it prepares requests and metadata but does not create worktrees, run git commands, or invoke Codex.
The next Stage 7 slice should wire preparation into backend execution orchestration with injected runners and diff-summary capture before enabling any real cleanup or live launch path.
follow_up_tasks: Shape Stage 7C to connect WorkerLaunchPreparation to CodexExecBackend.run through a non-live orchestrator/fake runner test.
Add diff-summary capture and changed-file validation integration before a completed launch can be accepted.
handoff_notes: Stage 7B adds worker_launches.py as the bridge from planning tasks to WorkerLaunchRequest. Future backend orchestration should call prepare_worker_launch_request instead of reconstructing paths or metadata manually.
